# CV — Founder Jones (placeholder)

Placeholder CV used only by the `investment-memo` thread. This file
exists at the per-thread level (`investment-memo/refs/`); it is NOT
shared with the four sibling threads (`latency-wall`,
`technical-vision`, `execution-plan`, `team-thesis`).

The per-thread placement is intentional in the fixture: it exercises
the resolver's per-thread-first ordering contract by giving the
`investment-memo` thread a unique refs entry that does NOT exist at
the portfolio level.
